name: AfdxGetSignalBool
title: AfdxGetSignalBool
syntax: long AfdxGetSignalBool( long packet, char* signalName[] ); // form 1
long AfdxGetSignalBool( long packet, long offset, long bitPosition ); // form 2
description: This function returns the value of a Boolean signal.

parameters.name: signalName
parameters.description: Name of the signal. Note: The signal and its message need to be defined in the assigned DBC file.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset value points to the starting byte of a 32-bit field in the AFDX payload area.

parameters.name: bitPosition
parameters.description: Position [1..32] of a single bit in a 32-bit area pointed to by offset.

description: Analyze signals from an incoming AFDX packet using DBC information

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
